raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1772 will give wildfire victims an additional year to rebuild their homes and businesses after a catastrophic wildfire.",
    "Extending the time a policy holder has to recoup their losses after a devastating fire will prevent battles with insurance companies.",
    "In October 2017, California experienced the most devastating wildfire in state history, resulting in the loss of 44 lives.",
    "More than 14,700 homes and 728 businesses were damaged or destroyed in the October 2017 wildfires, totaling over 9 billion dollars worth of insurable damage.",
    "Many constituents who had homes and businesses burn down during the Valley and Butte fires of 2015 are still not done rebuilding due to the magnitude of loss those communities experienced.",
    "Rebuild timelines for the North Bay and Southern California fires of 2017 are expected to be as time-consuming as those of previous wildfires.",
    "The size and scope of wildland fire events have grown significantly over the last decade in California."
  ]
}
```
